fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs designed to lose value, suggesting a bearish outlook for the product itself. The article implies that holding such instruments long-term is ill-advised due to their inherent decay mechanisms. Traders should be aware of the product's structure and its tendency to underperform over time, especially in non-volatile environments.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY Adding big here going into the close!!!!
$UVXY first, fuck you. hope you will be shorting every pop with your Pavlovian reflex developed over the greatest bull market in history until it rips 20x up. …
$SPY $UVXY $VIX Could one of you knowledgeable types find a way to trade VIX1D spot, and share it with us cerebrally challenged types. https://finance.yahoo.co…
